detail: `cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features profile-browser` finished with EXIT 0 (dev profile, warnings only) after the fix. The pre-fix baseline failed with E0425 (dep_graph/page.rs: nav/on_hover/on_deselect/selected_node_id/hovered_node_id + Navigator/TicketRef/select_node_or_navigate) and E0596 (store.rs open_ticket). Post-fix, none of those errors remain.
